article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid stands as a prominent figure in the Mexican electronic music scene, recognized for his contributions to moombahton and dancehall production.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
His production style is characterized by a blend of electronic beats and dancehall rhythms, drawing from both local and international influences.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack', which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
While his top tracks and recent releases are not indexed, his work is recognized within the electronic music community for its innovative sound.
Noizekid's contributions have helped shape the contemporary moombahton and dancehall landscape, particularly within the Mexican electronic music scene.
